creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
I've received package fallout mails for all 3 supported platforms for FreeBSD 13.4.

In the mail

Port dir last git commit: 19fbadfb9

sudo git show 19fbadfb9
commit 19fbadfb9f1e6ad863cd5a46d3efc7746391fbb4
Author: Koichiro Iwao <meta@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Tue Oct 8 09:49:44 2024 +0900

    devel/ruby-build: Update to 20241007
    

If this is anything to go by

Makefile datestamp: -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  2377 Oct  8 01:02 /usr/ports/devel/valgrind/Makefile

that corresponds to a9cd2ea19077aca395c0a40599d79b41f72f7c3d which is too old.

Building on FreeBSD 13.4 requires at least a2c8708362621b024f39f0268824e2e49734df5f
